## BofA's Epstein issues buy call on SpaceX near IPO price, anchoring thesis on launch leadership

A named BofA buy call at IPO-price lows provides a fundamental floor narrative for SPCX; whether launch-leadership fundamentals can outweigh post-IPO lock-up dynamics and thin institutional coverage is the critical near-term question.

- BofA analyst Epstein turned bullish on SPCX as the stock dipped toward its IPO price.
- Thesis anchored on 'launch leadership' as a durable competitive moat.
- The dip toward IPO price is framed by Epstein as a buying opportunity.
- Named analyst conviction directly contradicts the current price trend.
